scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=server && npm run build --workspace=client
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace=server && npm run test --workspace=client
scripts.docker:dev:upgrade: docker compose -p sp-dev -f docker-compose.dev.yml pull && docker compose -p sp-dev -f docker-compose.dev.yml up --build -d
scripts.docker:dev:shell:server: docker compose -p sp-dev -f docker-compose.dev.yml exec server sh
scripts.docker:dev:shell:db: docker compose -p sp-dev -f docker-compose.dev.yml exec db psql -U postgres spconfigurator
scripts.docker:dev:migrate: docker compose -p sp-dev -f docker-compose.dev.yml exec server npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.docker:dev:studio: docker compose -p sp-dev -f docker-compose.dev.yml exec server npx prisma studio
scripts.docker:prod:upgrade: docker compose -p sp-prod -f docker-compose.yml pull && docker compose -p sp-prod -f docker-compose.yml up --build -d
scripts.docker:prod:shell:server: docker compose -p sp-prod -f docker-compose.yml exec server sh
scripts.docker:prod:shell:db: docker compose -p sp-prod -f docker-compose.yml exec db psql -U postgres spconfigurator
scripts.docker:prod:migrate: docker compose -p sp-prod -f docker-compose.yml exec server npx prisma migrate deploy
scripts.docker:prod:studio: docker compose -p sp-prod -f docker-compose.yml exec server npx prisma studio
